description: This source file defines the `SecureSampleApp` class, a custom Application class for an Android app, handling initialization of security and network components including token storage, authentication, and API client. It also manages safe fallback initialization in case of startup failures.

classes.name: SecureSampleApp
classes.description: Custom Application class that initializes token management, authentication, and network client, with fallback safety mechanisms for startup failures.

methods.name: onCreate
methods.description: Overrides the Application.onCreate() method; initializes tokenStore, authManager, and apiClient. Implements error handling to fall back safely if initialization fails.
